creator: ru@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

The problem is not reproduceable, www.compaq.com is accessible 
through both 3.2-RELEASE and 3.2-STABLE hosts running natd(8). 

Originator doesn't respond. 

NB: www.compaq.com is blocking ICMP.  That could cause problems 
with IP Path MTU Discovery in certain cases (it depends on the 
minimum MTU value along the way from your host to www.compaq.com).
